### Description
Describe the specific test coverage gaps or behaviors to verify (e.g., boundary condition checks, unauthorized calls, specific failure states).

### Target Components
- [ ] Escrow Contract (`contracts/escrow`)
- [ ] Oracle Contract (`contracts/oracle`)

### Tasks
- [ ] Write unit or integration test cases reproducing the target scenarios
- [ ] Assert correct state changes and return values
- [ ] Assert correct event emissions
- [ ] Run full test suite and verify all tests pass
